case_title: LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY APARTMENTS VS. GABRIELLE MORABITO et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MORABITO, GABRIELLE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARAMAR URBAN SPECIALTY APARTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORABITO, GABRIELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 980 BUSH STREET, UNIT #102, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
